scope_note: Self-contained _ensure_gitignore_block step, NOT a tiers.json projection change — the projection-model overhaul (versioned block updates + uninstall removal) is WORK-0050. Implementation verified not to pre-empt it.

cycle_1.historian: BLOCKING — code/comment cited ADR-005 as containing an 'insights local-only; never commit' contract; ADR-005 is actually /contribute privacy fail-close. False citation (also pre-existing in Hedl's own .gitignore from PR#12).
cycle_1.security-auditor: SIGNIFICANT — metrics.json + proposals/ (reflect.py outputs) not covered; unanchored 'events.jsonl' over-broad/redundant. MINOR — read_text crash on directory/binary .gitignore.
cycle_1.edge-case-hunter: BLOCKING — IsADirectoryError crash when .gitignore is a directory. SIGNIFICANT — stale-block-body never re-applied. MINOR — empty-file leading blank; uninstall doesn't remove block; test gaps.

fixes: Reworded the citation: ADR-005 is Hedl's privacy principle (fail-closes /contribute); 'insights local-only' is operational practice not yet formalised — flagged for /phase-complete. No longer claims ADR-005 contains the literal rule. Hedl's own .gitignore comment aligned.

Coverage: added .work/insights/metrics.json + .work/insights/proposals/; removed the over-broad bare 'events.jsonl' (covered by the anchored .work/insights/*.jsonl glob). .md notes + README + .gitkeep stay trackable.
Guarded read in try/except (OSError, UnicodeDecodeError) -> clean 'skip' status, no crash on a directory/binary .gitignore.
Empty-or-absent .gitignore -> clean create (no leading blank line).
Docstring documents the marker-presence idempotency limitation (versioned updates deferred to WORK-0050).
Dogfood: Hedl's own .gitignore extended to metrics.json + proposals/ (it only had *.jsonl).
Tests: metrics.json/proposals coverage, empty-file clean block, unreadable-skip, README-stays-trackable, and a git check-ignore functional test across events.jsonl/metrics.json/proposals + README.

cycle_2.historian: PASS — citation accurate; ACs 1-7 satisfied; scope correct (no WORK-0050 pre-emption; distinct from WORK-0013).
cycle_2.security-auditor: CONDITIONAL — all cycle-1 RESOLVED; new MINORs cosmetic (status word 'created' for an empty-existing file).
cycle_2.edge-case-hunter: CONDITIONAL — directory crash + empty-file RESOLVED+tested; stale-body accepted+documented; 'double-blank append' claim VERIFIED INCORRECT (both branches yield exactly one blank line); proposals/ functional-test gap CLOSED this cycle.

accepted_minor: Status word 'created' when overwriting an empty existing .gitignore (cosmetic).
Uninstall/downgrade does not remove the block (harmless additive; precise removal is WORK-0050's manifest).
verdict: RESOLVED — zero BLOCKING/SIGNIFICANT after 2 cycles; ADR-005 citation corrected, coverage completed, crash guarded, dogfood aligned.
